mapper.sql: id, group_id, source_table, target_table, priority, fetch_sql, delete_where, start_time, keep_day, step_minutes, step_count, pause_ms, enable_clean, enable_write, enable_status, id_column, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE ea_archive_group_item_by_time
source_table = #{sourceTable}, target_table = #{targetTable}, priority = #{priority}, fetch_sql = #{fetchSql}, delete_where = #{deleteWhere}, start_time = #{startTime}, keep_day = #{keepDay}, step_minutes = #{stepMinutes}, step_count = #{stepCount}, pause_ms = #{pauseMs}, enable_clean = #{enableClean}, enable_write = #{enableWrite}, enable_status = #{enableStatus}, id_column = #{idColumn}, updater_id = #{updaterId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group_item_by_time SET enable_status = #{enableStatus}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group_item_by_time SET deleted = id, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_item_by_time WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_item_by_time WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND enable_status = 0 AND deleted = 0
